transcription.text: You're probably used to an organ that makes organ sounds. Here's one that does a lot more. It's a Wurlitzer spinet organ with an electronic synthesizer. It has an extra row of keys that lets you make sounds you've never been able to make on a home organ before. Orbit 3 by Wurlitzer. It may just change your mind.

It has an extra row of keys that lets you make sounds you've never been able to make on a home organ before.
It may just change your mind.
